body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Use the new FluxnetSimulationsExt from drivers in experiments/integrated/fluxnet/.

closes #1249

Note: `ozark_soilsnow.jl` results changed because we weren't using the ozark parameters before, but the general trends remain the same after this PR. All other fluxnet results are unchanged.

## Content
- [x] use extension in fluxnet drivers: `run_fluxnet.jl`, `ozark_pft.jl`, `ozark_soilsnow.jl`
- [x] rename `experiments/integrated/fluxnet/snow_soil/simulation.jl` -> `experiments/integrated/fluxnet/ozark_soilsnow.jl`
- [x] delete site-specific folders/files in experiments/
title: use FluxnetSimulationsExt in experiments/
